changes: Removed YAML frontmatter with 'name: xlsx' that caused devstral-small to enter infinite loop calling skill(name='xlsx') tool
Replaced title with plain markdown heading '# Excel Spreadsheet Instructions' to avoid skill tool confusion
Added explicit 'Do NOT call any skill tool' instruction at the top
Added Reading/Analyzing section with TOTAL/summary row filtering pattern
Added SKIP_LABELS set to filter out TOTAL, SUM, AVERAGE, GRAND TOTAL rows when reading spreadsheets
Added explicit instruction to use len(data) (filtered rows) as denominator for rate calculations
Removed unreferenced files: scripts/create_xlsx.py, recalc.py, LICENSE.txt
